title: Regular closed OR operator
summary: Instantiates OR operator data with the regular closed rational coefficients and proves tangentiality conditional on a compatible defect expansion and rational cancellation proof.

mathematicalContent.heading: Regular operator
mathematicalContent.body: At fixed N,n,w₁,w₂, the regular coefficient system is inserted into the finite OR-indexed word sum.

mathematicalContent.heading: Conditional descent
mathematicalContent.body: The theorem assumes both a geometric defect expansion whose real coefficients match a rational model and the cancellation of that rational model.

correspondence.leanType: def regular (N : ℕ) (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) : OROperatorData
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Builds OR operator data using the regular closed coefficient system.

correspondence.leanType: theorem regular_coeffSystem_coeff (N : ℕ) (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ((regular N n w₁ w₂).coeffSystem).coeff I = ORRegularCoeff n w₁ w₂ I
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Unfolds the coefficient stored in the regular operator datum.

correspondence.leanType: def regularOperator (N : ℕ) (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (CalConf : Calculus Conf) : CalConf.BiOperator
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Defines the regular closed OR bidifferential operator.

correspondence.leanType: theorem regular_isBiTangential_of_rational_defect_cancellation {κ : Type _} [DecidableEq κ] (N : ℕ) (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) {K : Finset κ} (E : (regular N n w₁ w₂).ORDefectExpansion CalConf K) (defectCoeffQ : ORIndex N → Fin 2 → κ → ℚ) (hE : ∀ (I : ORIndex N) (slot : Fin 2) (k : κ), E.defectCoeffR I slot k = (defectCoeffQ I slot k : ℝ)) (hQ : (regular N n w₁ w₂).SatisfiesRationalDefectCancellation K defectCoeffQ) : CalConf.IsBiTangentialAtWeights ((regular N n w₁ w₂).toOperator CalConf) (w₁ : ℝ) (w₂ : ℝ)
correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Proves tangentiality of the regular operator from a supplied compatible defect expansion and rational cancellation proof.

references.locator: Classification of invariant bilinear differential operators
references.note: Flat-model origin of the coefficient family.
Primary curved ambient source for the encoded OR recurrence.

limitations: This file does not supply the geometric defect expansion or the global rational cancellation proof. Thus it does not establish unconditional tangentiality of the regular curved OR operator; it packages and applies those assumptions.
